_comment: Documented, reviewed deviations from the default access policy enforced by
scripts/policy_analyzer.py. A matching, UNEXPIRED entry downgrades a finding
from a gating violation to an 'accepted risk' (still reported, not blocking).
An expired entry stops suppressing — the risk re-surfaces for re-review.
This is the auditable who/what/why/until handed to a regulator: every PII
access path beyond the admin group is justified, approved, and time-bound.

exceptions.justification: CRM operations team requires read access to customer records to service accounts. Access is read-only (SELECT), scoped to the crm_managers group, and covered by DPIA-2026-014.
Web analytics PII is pseudonymised at source; data scientists use it for aggregate modelling only. Accepted risk pending the migration to a fully anonymised feature view (tracked in DPIA-2026-021).
